name: Soft-Proceed — First Turn with Goal, Options, Constraints
description: User provides a well-specified decision brief with goal, options, and constraints on the first turn. The orchestrator should soft-proceed directly to draft_graph without asking clarifying questions.
user_message: Should we raise prices from £49 to £59? Our goal is £20k MRR within 12 months. We need to keep churn under 4%. The other option is to keep pricing at £49 and focus on volume growth.
